name: Brutus - Pumpkin Demon
description:
[ORIGINAL CHARACTERS]

"What're you doing in MY patch?!"

Sorry for the delay, just been procrastinating ALOT. Anyway here's my contribution to Halloween :P

You decided to waltz into a pumpkin patch just for the fun of it. But you get caught by the person who goes in.

[ART BY e-zoid ON E621]
creator: MarkovRobot
